basic_details.job_title: RRI Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Raman Research Institute (RRI) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 25 May 2026 on the official website Raman Research Institute. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the RRI Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 26 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Govt. of India rules for the candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC/PWD categories.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./M.Tech. (Physics /Electronics/ Related fields) or B.Sc./B.E. / B.Tech (Physics/Engineering Physics / Electronics / Related fields)
qualification.details: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Physics / Electronics / Related fields OR B.Sc./B.E. / B.Tech in Physics/Engineering Physics / Electronics / Related fields with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent. At least 6 months of experience in handling experiments related to optics and technology. Candidates who have appeared for their final examination are also eligible to apply. If selected, they must submit their provisional degree certificate at the time of joining.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RRI Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RRI Research Assistant (RA) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the RRI Research Assistant (RA) posts is 24th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant (RA) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Research Assistant (RA) position at the Raman Research Institute (RRI) for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant (RA) role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.Sc./M.Tech. in Physics/Electronics or related fields, or a B.Sc./B.E./B.Tech in Physics/Engineering Physics/Electronics or related fields with at least 60% marks and 6 months of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Research Assistant (RA) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Assistant (RA) post is 26 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant (RA) post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Research Assistant (RA) position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for RRI Research Assistant (RA) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant (RA) role at RRI?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant (RA) position at Raman Research Institute will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can final year students apply for the Research Assistant (RA) position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who have appeared for their final examination are eligible to apply. They will need to submit their provisional degree certificate upon joining if selected.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this RRI recruitment?
faq.answer: The Research Assistant (RA) position at Raman Research Institute is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification PDF and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of RRI is also provided there.
